title: Add AI-powered chatbot
original_text: Implemented AI-powered chatbot for customer support. Integrated OpenAI GPT-4 for natural language understanding. Implemented context-aware conversations. Added knowledge base integration. Implemented intent classification and entity extraction. Added handoff to human agents. Added chatbot analytics and improvement tracking. Result: chatbot deployed and handling queries.
expected_subject: feat(ai): add AI-powered chatbot for customer support
expected_body_lines: - Implement intent classification and entity extraction
- Add handoff to human agents and analytics
- Validation: chatbot deployed and handling queries
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ai): add AI-powered chatbot for customer support"
